rationale: Corpus 'Mid (unspecified level)' bucket has 3 real points from 2 named companies (Brex Enterprise Implementation Consultant $145.5K-$181.9K NY / $128.8K-$161K Vancouver-CAD; Hudl Implementation Consultant $63K-$106K).
